nodes.name: CallRail Webhook
nodes.notes: Configure CallRail to POST every post_call event here. URL: https://phoenixphaseconverters.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/callrail-realtime-ingest

nodes.name: Wait 30s for Transcript
nodes.notes: CallRail transcribes asynchronously. 30s is enough for short/medium calls; long calls fall back to the call_summary field.

nodes.name: Fetch Full Call from CallRail
nodes.notes: Account ID 906309465. The API key here matches the working key in the phone-followup skill.

nodes.name: Claude Haiku - One-Sentence Summary
nodes.notes: Uses Haiku per master skill — boss/seo/ads/emails all on Haiku 4.5. Only moltocalls is locked to Sonnet, this is not moltocalls.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "callId":          "{{ $json.callId }}",
  "phone":           "{{ $json.phone }}",
  "trackingPhone":   "{{ $json.trackingPhone }}",
  "callerName":      {{ JSON.stringify($json.callerName || '') }},
  "city":            {{ JSON.stringify($json.city || '') }},
  "state":           {{ JSON.stringify($json.state || '') }},
  "direction":       "{{ $json.direction }}",
  "duration":        {{ $json.duration }},
  "answered":        {{ $json.answered }},
  "voicemail":       {{ $json.voicemail }},
  "startTime":       "{{ $json.startTime }}",
  "transcript":      {{ JSON.stringify($json.transcript || '') }},
  "callRailSummary": {{ JSON.stringify($json.callRailSummary || '') }},
  "aiOneSentence":   {{ JSON.stringify($json.aiOneSentence || '') }}
}
